name: InputOTPRoot
description: Root controller for a segmented OTP/code input.
whenToUse: Collecting verification codes, PINs, or one-time passwords.
avoidWhen: General text input - use Input. Password input - use Input with type='password'.
accessibilityRequirements: Uses a hidden input for keyboard/paste support. aria-label required.

pattern.description: Pattern to filter allowed characters (e.g., digits only).

oncomplete.description: Called when all slots are filled.

parts.name: InputOTPGroup
parts.description: Groups InputOTPSlot components together for styling.
parts.whenToUse: When you want to style groups of slots differently or add separators between groups.

parts.name: InputOTPSlot
parts.description: Visual slot for a single OTP character.

parts.name: InputOTPSeparator
parts.description: Visual separator between OTP slot groups.
parts.whenToUse: Between InputOTPSlot groups (e.g., after slot 2 in a 6-digit code).

examples.title: OTP Code Entry with Groups
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; otpValue = (el.value ?? otpValue); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; otpValue = (el.value ?? otpValue); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; otpValue = (el.value ?? otpValue); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; otpValue = (el.value ?? otpValue); }} aria-label="Verification code"> {#if otpValue}

Value: {otpValue}

{/if}

examples.title: 4-Digit PIN
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; pinValue = (el.value ?? pinValue); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; pinValue = (el.value ?? pinValue); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; pinValue = (el.value ?? pinValue); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; pinValue = (el.value ?? pinValue); }} aria-label="PIN code"> {#if pinValue.length === 4}

PIN complete!

{/if}

examples.title: 6-Digit Code (No Groups)
examples.code:
<sg-input-otp-root length={6} aria-label="6-digit code">
    <sg-input-otp-slot index={0} />
    <sg-input-otp-slot index={1} />
    <sg-input-otp-slot index={2} />
    <sg-input-otp-slot index={3} />
    <sg-input-otp-slot index={4} />
    <sg-input-otp-slot index={5} />
</sg-input-otp-root>

examples.title: Disabled
examples.code:
<sg-input-otp-root length={4} disabled={true} aria-label="Disabled OTP">
    <sg-input-otp-group>
        <sg-input-otp-slot index={0} />
        <sg-input-otp-slot index={1} />
        <sg-input-otp-slot index={2} />
        <sg-input-otp-slot index={3} />
    </sg-input-otp-group>
</sg-input-otp-root>
